notes.v7a_ml_only: Policy basée uniquement sur target A (gain futur) + target B (drop proba).
notes.v7a_hybrid: Policy + trigger Q10_train_route (fallback baseline) pour comparaison honnête.
notes.alert_precision_legacy_future_lower: Ancienne métrique — probabilité qu'un prix futur passe sous le prix d'alerte. Surtout mesure la volatilité. Conservée pour comparaison.
notes.alert_recall_floor_1_05: % obs dans [floor, floor × 1.05] qui ont reçu une alerte.
notes.regret_realized_after_alert_mean: Regret moyen si le client achetait au moment de l'alerte.

limitations: alert_near_floor_pct gate uses q10 of train-route price; if the training features parquet was unavailable, the script falls back to a Gaussian approximation (mean - 1.28*std), which is less accurate.
regret/capture are computed per (route, depart_date) trajectory, taking the price of the FIRST BUY_NOW. Trajectories with no BUY are excluded from regret stats.
Test split has no rows in TTD bucket 61+ — the ttd_upper gate is effectively bounded above by the data.
V7a was trained on 2022-04 to 2022-10 only — no winter and no 2023+ data. Sweep results are conditional on this window.
next_recommendation: Pick the top non-dominated candidate that meets the Phase-1 constraint set, then open a follow-up PR to update the constants in scripts/train/v7a/policy.py (NOT in this sprint). If no candidate meets all constraints, the Pareto frontier in this report is the basis for trade-off discussion before any policy change.
